speaker: speaker1
text: Good evening , Pizza House . This is Marty speaking.May I take your order ?

speaker: speaker2
text: Um yes . I'd like a medium pizza with pepperoni , olives , and extra cheese .

speaker: speaker1
text: We have a two-for-one special on large pizzas.Would you like a large pizza instead ?

speaker: speaker1
text: Great ! Would you like your second pizza to be the same as the first ?

speaker: speaker2
text: No , make the second one with ham , pineapple and green peppers . Oh , and make it thin crust .

speaker: speaker1
text: Okay , thin crust . Your total is $ 21.50 and yourorder will arrive in thirty minutes or it ’ s free !
